# features

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Landing features band: a heading over a responsive grid of feature cards describing what equin ships (agent manager, pages, mail, theming, plugins, workflows).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Website.Section` "Features" → `FeaturesSection`
  - Uses: `apps/website/shell.Website`, `primitives/css/card.Card`, `primitives/css/grid.Grid`, `primitives/css/spacing.Inset`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`
